snippets.title: Dynamic typing
snippets.explanation: The same name can be rebound to objects of different types.

snippets.title: Strong typing prevents silent coercion
snippets.code:
"3" + 5      # TypeError: can only concatenate str to str
int("3") + 5  # 8 — convert explicitly
snippets.explanation: Python refuses to guess; you convert types explicitly.

snippets.title: f-strings
snippets.code:
name = "Ada"
age = 36
print(f"{name} is {age} years old")  # Ada is 36 years old
snippets.explanation: f-strings are the modern, readable way to format strings.
